title: DryRunLocalResult
description:
Output ‚Äî the standard ``findings`` envelope every validator shares.

Empty ``findings`` == pass. Findings carry the failing ``task_id``
(and, for the smoke layer, the captured ``stderr`` tail) in
``evidence`` so the /submit-hpc cascade can surface the raw error
verbatim, exactly as it does for verify-canary.

ValidatorFinding.description:
One actionable finding emitted by a single atomic validator.

Shared across every validator so the agent loop can branch on
``code`` uniformly. Fields:

* ``validator`` ‚Äî name of the validator that emitted the finding
  (e.g. ``"validate-executor-signatures"``); the workflow report
  collects findings from every atom and prefixes by validator so
  the agent knows where each came from.
* ``severity`` ‚Äî ``"error"`` blocks submission, ``"warning"`` is
  informational, ``"info"`` is purely advisory.
* ``code`` ‚Äî machine-readable enum the agent branches on (e.g.
  ``"missing_parameter"``, ``"row_index_oob"``,
  ``"walltime_below_p95"``).
* ``message`` ‚Äî human-readable summary surfaced in the report.
* ``suggested_fix`` ‚Äî optional hint for the agent ("increase
  walltime to >= 7200s" / "use --gpu a100"). Lets the agent loop
  apply a fix without LLM-reasoning the recovery path.
* ``evidence`` ‚Äî validator-specific raw values (the ``p95_sec``,
  the ``requested_walltime_sec``, the missing ``param_name``).
* ``file`` / ``line`` ‚Äî when the finding is sourced from a code
  location (executor module, tasks.py), surface it for line-level
  evidence.
ValidatorFinding.title: ValidatorFinding
